Use black for the logo and brand text.","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/94312c4977de4e05a40395bad6ee88ae","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

Key adjustments include:
- **Simplified Sidebar**: Removed navigation tabs to focus on the three core zones: branding, previous searches, and the user profile. I also cleaned up the profile section by removing the "Ver perfil" link and adding subtle dividers.
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the black line-art cohete logo asset and wordmark at the top of the sidebar.
- **Focused Workspace**: Cleared the main area of suggestion chips, keyboard shortcut badges, and footer text, leaving only the primary headline and search input to maximize focus on the "Ask Leadiva" experience.
- **Palette Integrity**: Preserved the clean mint backgrounds and teal accents consistent with the project's flat institutional aesthetic."},{"suggestion":"Add a loading state for the search results"},{"suggestion":"Create the search results list screen"},{"suggestion":"Add a 'New Search' button to the sidebar"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/94312c4977de4e05a40395bad6ee88ae
screens.prompt:
Refine the screen to match the wireframe {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}} more strictly:

1. BRANDING: Use official black line-art rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_17}} and "Leadiva" wordmark in the top of the sidebar.
2. SIDEBAR STRUCTURE: 
   - Remove "Inicio" and "Oportunidades" navigation items.
   - The sidebar should have exactly three zones: Brand (top), "Búsquedas anteriores" section with its list items (middle), and User Profile (bottom).
   - Use thin dividers to separate these zones.
   - User profile at bottom should show avatar "DM" and name "Diego Murillo Correa". Remove "Ver perfil" link.
3. MAIN AREA:
   - Keep headline "¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?".
   - Keep search input with placeholder "Pregunta a Leadiva" and teal send button.
   - REMOVE: Suggestion chips under the search bar.
   - REMOVE: Keyboard shortcut badges (cmd+K) inside input.
   - REMOVE: Footer text "AI DRIVEN MARKET INTELLIGENCE...".
4. STYLE: Maintain "Flat Institutional" mint palette (#d9eedb, #f4faf6, etc.). No gradients or shadows. Use black for the logo and brand text.
screens.title: / — Inicio (Wireframe Refined)

outputComponents.text:
I have refined the home screen to strictly follow the wireframe layout while maintaining the **Leadiva Mint** institutional style.

Key adjustments include:
- **Simplified Sidebar**: Removed navigation tabs to focus on the three core zones: branding, previous searches, and the user profile. I also cleaned up the profile section by removing the "Ver perfil" link and adding subtle dividers.
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the black line-art cohete logo asset and wordmark at the top of the sidebar.
- **Focused Workspace**: Cleared the main area of suggestion chips, keyboard shortcut badges, and footer text, leaving only the primary headline and search input to maximize focus on the "Ask Leadiva" experience.
- **Palette Integrity**: Preserved the clean mint backgrounds and teal accents consistent with the project's flat institutional aesthetic.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a loading state for the search results
Create the search results list screen
Add a 'New Search' button to the sidebar
